subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #002 Proofs and Evidences of the Existence of God
subcodes.first_line: Among the proofs and arguments for the existence of God is the fact that man has not created himself
subcodes.first_line_orig: و از جمله دلائل و براهین الوهیت آنکه انسان خود را خلق ننموده بلکه خالق و مصور دیگری است
subcodes.subjects: @proofs for the existence of God, @necessary and possible being, @knowledge; recognition of God, @rational arguments, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
